# OpenSRE

> OpenSRE is an open-source AI SRE platform that investigates production incidents autonomously.
> It uses episodic memory to learn from past incidents and a Neo4j knowledge graph to map service
> dependencies. Licensed Apache 2.0, self-hosted, and provider-agnostic via LiteLLM.

## Links

- Website: https://opensre.in
- Documentation: https://opensre.in/docs
- GitHub: https://github.com/swapnildahiphale/OpenSRE
- Live Demo: https://demo.opensre.in
- Full knowledge dump: https://opensre.in/llms-full.txt

## Key Features

- 46 production investigation skills (Datadog, Grafana, PagerDuty, Elasticsearch, K8s, AWS)
- Episodic memory system that learns from every investigation
- Neo4j knowledge graph for service topology and blast radius analysis
- Multi-provider LLM support via LiteLLM (Claude, OpenAI, Gemini, DeepSeek, Mistral, Ollama)
- LangGraph agent orchestration (planner, subagents, synthesizer, writeup)
- Web console with dashboard, agent runs, memory browser, config editor
- Slack, Microsoft Teams, Google Chat integration
- Self-hosted, Apache 2.0 licensed

## Architecture

Slack / Web UI / API → sre-agent (LangGraph orchestration) → Memory System (episodic) + 46 Skills (production tools) + Knowledge Graph (Neo4j)

## Quick Start

git clone https://github.com/swapnildahiphale/OpenSRE.git
cd OpenSRE
cp .env.example .env
make dev
